name: Hisabi Wallet Operational Snapshot
query: SELECT w.name AS "Wallet:Link/Hisabi Wallet:180", w.wallet_name AS "Wallet Name:Data:180", w.status AS "Wallet Status:Data:100", COALESCE(m.member_count, 0) AS "Members:Int:90", COALESCE(a.account_count, 0) AS "Accounts:Int:90", COALESCE(t.tx_count, 0) AS "Transactions:Int:100", COALESCE(d.debt_count, 0) AS "Open Debts:Int:100" FROM `tabHisabi Wallet` w LEFT JOIN (SELECT wallet, COUNT(name) AS member_count FROM `tabHisabi Wallet Member` WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY wallet) m ON m.wallet = w.name LEFT JOIN (SELECT wallet_id, COUNT(name) AS account_count FROM `tabHisabi Account` WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY wallet_id) a ON a.wallet_id = w.name LEFT JOIN (SELECT wallet_id, COUNT(name) AS tx_count FROM `tabHisabi Transaction` WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY wallet_id) t ON t.wallet_id = w.name LEFT JOIN (SELECT wallet_id, COUNT(name) AS debt_count FROM `tabHisabi Debt` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN ('active', 'pending') GROUP BY wallet_id) d ON d.wallet_id = w.name WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY w.modified DESC
